resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def isFascinating(self, n: int) -> bool:
        s = str(n)
        if len(s) != 3:
            return False
        for i in range(1, 10):
            if str(i) not in s + str(2 * n) + str(3 * n):
                return False
        return True
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution directly checks if the concatenated string contains all digits from 1 to 9 exactly once. It first checks if the input number has exactly 3 digits, then iterates over the digits from 1 to 9 to check if they are present in the concatenated string.
